taskTemplate.name: Master Property Insurance Review
taskTemplate.description: Review condominium or project master property insurance for FNMA compliance and determine if HO6 review is required.

subTaskTemplate.name: Project Insured Confirmation
subTaskTemplate.description: Project Insured Confirmation – Confirm the master property insurance policy insures the subject condominium or project development.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Project Insured Confirmation

subTaskTemplate.name: Unit Within Project Confirmation
subTaskTemplate.description: Unit Within Project Confirmation – Confirm the subject unit is located within the insured project development shown on the master policy.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Unit Within Project Confirmation

subTaskTemplate.name: Policy Effective Before Closing
subTaskTemplate.description: Policy Effective Before Closing – Confirm the master policy effective date is on or before the loan closing.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Policy Effective Date

subTaskTemplate.name: Policy Active at Closing
subTaskTemplate.description: Policy Active at Closing – Confirm the master policy term is active and not expired as of the loan closing date.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Policy Active Status

subTaskTemplate.name: Replacement Cost Coverage Sufficiency
subTaskTemplate.description: Replacement Cost Coverage Sufficiency – Confirm the master policy coverage equals at least 100% of the estimated replacement cost value of project improvements, including common elements and residential structures.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Replacement Cost Sufficiency

subTaskTemplate.name: Coverage Documentation Present
subTaskTemplate.description: Coverage Documentation Present – Confirm the file contains acceptable documentation supporting master policy coverage sufficiency (guaranteed or extended replacement cost, RCV estimate, risk appraisal, or insurer/qualified professional statement). Mark Issue to trigger Insurance Documentation Condition.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Coverage Documentation

subTaskTemplate.name: Replacement Cost Loss Settlement
subTaskTemplate.description: Replacement Cost Loss Settlement – Confirm the master policy provides replacement cost coverage for required building and property coverage, except roofs.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Loss Settlement

subTaskTemplate.name: Roof Coverage Confirmation
subTaskTemplate.description: Roof Coverage Confirmation – Confirm roofs are insured under the master policy, even if not insured on a replacement cost basis.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Roof Coverage

subTaskTemplate.name: ACV Language Review
subTaskTemplate.description: ACV Language Review – If actual cash value language is present, confirm ACV treatment is limited to personal property or specific elements and does not reduce required building coverage below FNMA standards.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – ACV Language

subTaskTemplate.name: Master Policy Deductible Review
subTaskTemplate.description: Master Policy Deductible Review – Confirm the deductible for all required property insurance perils does not exceed 5% of the total master property coverage amount.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Deductible Review

subTaskTemplate.name: Per-Unit Deductible Exists
subTaskTemplate.description: Per-Unit Deductible Exists – Determine whether the master policy includes a per-unit deductible that applies to an individual unit owner. If Per-Unit Deductible Exists, mark Issue to trigger HO6 Policy Review task.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Per-Unit Deductible Exists

subTaskTemplate.name: Per-Unit Deductible Amount Review
subTaskTemplate.description: Per-Unit Deductible Amount Review – If a per-unit deductible exists, confirm the amount does not exceed $50,000 per unit.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Per-Unit Deductible Amount

subTaskTemplate.name: Interior Coverage Gap
subTaskTemplate.description: Interior Coverage Gap – Determine whether any portion of the interior of the unit or unit improvements are not covered by the master policy. If Gap Exists, mark Issue to trigger HO6 Policy Review task.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Interior Coverage Gap

subTaskTemplate.name: Mortgagee Clause Review
subTaskTemplate.description: Mortgagee Clause Review – Review mortgagee clause requirements based on investor, insurer, or internal policy guidelines, if applicable.
subTaskTemplate.type: Master Property Insurance Review – Mortgagee Clause
